description_long: This shotgun features a striking blue finish adorned with various astrological and geometric symbols in lighter hues, giving it a unique, decorative appearance. The body is elongated with a traditional shotgun silhouette, including a full stock and a long barrel. The barrel section is decorated with evenly spaced circular accents, and the receiver area is highlighted with a central medallion-like motif. The stock is angular and robust, providing a solid grip, while the fore-end is streamlined and visually integrated with the barrel. The overall design is modern and artistic, with no visible mechanical embellishments such as a pump or lever. The surface appears hard and smooth, likely constructed from metal with a painted or coated finish.
description: A blue, symbol-adorned shotgun with a full stock and long, decorated barrel, featuring astrological motifs and a sleek, modern design.
description_view_0: The shotgun is seen from the muzzle end, showing a narrow profile with the barrel and stock aligned, and some decorative symbols visible along the top.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the entire length of the shotgun, highlighting the blue color, astrological symbols, and the medallion motif on the receiver.
description_view_2: Viewed from the rear, the stock and barrel are aligned, with the circular end of the stock and some top-side decorations visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the same decorative motifs and blue finish, with the barrel and stock details mirrored from the other side.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, uniform barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth, uninterrupted contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
